name: heym
description: Build AI workflows by prompt or visual canvas. Heym is source-available and self-hosted, with agents, RAG, MCP, HITL, observability, evals, token cost tracking and more.
summaryZh: Build AI workflows by prompt or visual canvas. Heym is source-available and self-hosted, with agents, RAG, MCP, HITL, observability, evals, token cost tracking and more. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
